workshopUsers.//: One entry per workshop participant or per Entra group of participants. Replace objectId with a real Entra user/group object id. principalType is 'User', 'Group', or 'ServicePrincipal'. Find a user id with: az ad user show --id alias@contoso.com --query id -o tsv. Find a group id with: az ad group show --group 'workshop-participants' --query id -o tsv

userAccess.//: Part D — the exact level of access participants receive. Change resourceGroup.roleDefinitionId to raise/lower the control-plane level.

value.//resourceGroup: Resource group access. Default: Contributor = manage/use every resource in the workshop RG (but NOT assign roles). With key-based auth enabled, Contributor lets participants read the resource keys / connection settings they need (including Cosmos). Built-in Contributor id: b24988ac-6180-42a0-9c14-49b21d8d3a83.
